feature.name: Cobertura XML report writer
feature.description: Extract coverage.py XML report generation (XmlReporter) and supporting analysis types as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: emit Cobertura-compatible XML with coverage, packages, and classes
serialize line and branch hit information from Analysis objects
honor xml_package_depth and skip_empty config options
excluded_behaviors: configuration file discovery beyond CoverageConfig fields

entanglement.description: XML reporting couples CoverageConfig report options, Analysis results, FileReporter metadata, and DOM serialization.
signals: xml_package_depth truncates package names from relative paths
skip_empty omits zero-statement files from output
branch arcs encoded in line elements when data.has_arcs()

output.import: from featurelifted import Analysis, CoverageConfig, XmlReporter, rate, serialize_xml
